user_query:
I need help getting an email invite ready for our Cal Bears Rugby 1986 team’s 40th reunion and documenting the planning call notes, using only the local files in this workspace. Please do the following:

Inputs to use:
- input/mailbox.jsonl (newline-delimited JSON emails)
- input/draft_invite.md (invite template with placeholders)
- input/roster.csv (teammate names and emails)
- Directory: input/attachments/ (files to mention/include)

Requirements:
1) Inspect input/mailbox.jsonl to extract the final reunion details (date, time, venues, RSVP deadline, and RSVP email). If there is any conflicting information across emails, use the latest email by its "date" field as the authoritative source.
2) Rewrite input/draft_invite.md to produce output/invite_email.md:
   - Replace all placeholders [DATE], [TIME], [VENUE], [RSVP_DEADLINE], and [RSVP_EMAIL] with the values you extracted.
   - Keep the existing friendly tone; do not invent facts not present in the mailbox.
   - Add a short attachments section listing every file found under input/attachments/ (file names only, one per line) so recipients know what’s included.
   - Ensure the first line remains a Subject: line and includes “Cal Bears Rugby 1986 Team — 40th Reunion Invite”.
3) Prepare output/meeting_notes_and_action_items.md by summarizing from input/mailbox.jsonl:
   - A Decisions section (date, time, venues, RSVP deadline/email).
   - An Action Items section listing each task with owner and due date; if later emails update any item, reflect the latest status.
4) Inspect input/attachments/ and generate output/attachments_manifest.csv with two columns: file_path,size_bytes, listing each file under that directory and its size in bytes.
5) From input/roster.csv, generate output/recipient_list.csv with columns: name,email,status where status is “ok” if email is present and “missing” if empty. Include all rows from the roster (do not drop those with missing emails). The number of rows must match the roster.

Deliverables (write all files under the output/ directory):
- output/invite_email.md
- output/meeting_notes_and_action_items.md
- output/attachments_manifest.csv
- output/recipient_list.csv

This is for our 1986 championship team; please make sure the invite references the reunion and that the details come from the latest email in input/mailbox.jsonl. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
